skills.name: create-project
skills.description: Create a new Kube-DC project with isolated VPC networking inside an existing organization. Handles network type selection (cloud vs public), organization verification, and project manifest generation.

skills.name: deploy-app
skills.description: Deploy a containerized application to a Kube-DC project with optional database, service exposure (HTTPS via Gateway or direct EIP), and persistent storage. Covers Helm deployments and raw manifests.

skills.name: create-vm
skills.description: Deploy a virtual machine in a Kube-DC project with SSH access, cloud-init configuration, and optional external IP exposure. Supports Ubuntu, Debian, and Windows images.

skills.name: create-database
skills.description: Create a managed PostgreSQL or MariaDB database in a Kube-DC project, configure access for workloads via environment variables and secrets, and optionally expose externally via Gateway or LoadBalancer.

skills.name: expose-service
skills.description: Expose a Kube-DC service externally via Gateway Route (HTTP/HTTPS/gRPC with auto TLS) or Direct EIP + LoadBalancer (any TCP/UDP). Includes decision guide for choosing the right exposure method.

skills.name: manage-cluster
skills.description: Manage Kube-DC managed Kubernetes clusters — scale worker pools, upgrade versions, access kubeconfig, and monitor status. Covers day-2 operations via kubectl patch.

skills.name: manage-networking
skills.description: Manage Kube-DC networking resources — create External IPs (EIp), Floating IPs (FIp), and understand VPC networking. Includes decision guide for choosing between EIP and FIP.

skills.name: manage-storage
skills.description: Manage Kube-DC storage resources — create S3 buckets (ObjectBucketClaim), DataVolumes for VMs, and PersistentVolumeClaims for containers.

skills.name: manage-access
skills.description: Manage Kube-DC organization groups and RBAC — create OrganizationGroup resources to map user groups to Kubernetes roles per project. Note that user management is UI-only (Keycloak).

skills.name: ssh-into-vm
skills.description: SSH into a Kube-DC virtual machine using the project's auto-generated SSH keypair. Covers extracting keys, finding VM IP, and connecting via internal IP or external FIP/EIP.
